summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Resqly V1 - Provider Acquisition Platform + Consumer Pre-Launch Platform. All 19 user stories tested and verified working. Backend: 30/30 API tests passed (100%). Frontend: All flows tested successfully including consumer login/onboarding, provider registration/KYC, admin approval workflow, and compliance pages.
passed_tests: USER STORY 1: Landing page role selection (Continue as Consumer / Join as Resqly Ranger) - routes correctly
USER STORY 2: Consumer OTP login - phone input, OTP request, mock OTP 123456 displayed, verify works
USER STORY 3: Consumer onboarding - name, city, blood group, hospital saved successfully
USER STORY 4: Consumer home - location header, notification bell, profile icon, hero CTA, 9 services grid, Ranger CTA all present
USER STORY 5: Service detail pages - 'onboarding verified providers' message shown, Join Waitlist form present
USER STORY 6: Resqly Ranger CTA navigates to /provider/login
USER STORY 7: Emergency Profile - blood group, allergies, medical conditions, hospital, emergency contacts saved and persisted
USER STORY 8: Waitlist submission - form accepts name/phone/city/location and shows success
USER STORY 9: Provider login - Phone OTP tab and Email tab both functional. Email supports Login, Register, Forgot Password (returns reset token), Reset Password
USER STORY 10: Provider category selection - 8 categories displayed (Ambulance, Doctor, Pharmacy, Home Nursing, Home Care, Bystander, Pet Doctor, Pet Pharmacy)
USER STORY 11: Provider KYC - basic info (name, city, service area) saved, document upload UI present with file pickers, Submit validation works (fails if docs missing)
USER STORY 12: Provider status page - shows 'Application Under Review' after submission

USER STORY 13: Admin login with password 'resqly-admin-2026' works. Dashboard shows stats and provider list with filters (Pending/Approved/Rejected/Resubmit/Incomplete/All). Provider detail page shows Approve/Reject/Resubmit buttons
USER STORY 14: Admin approval workflow - approving provider changes status to 'approved'
USER STORY 15: Provider availability toggle - Available/Busy/Offline buttons present. Correctly blocked before approval, allowed after approval
USER STORY 16: Provider orders, earnings, reviews - all show clean empty states (no seed data)
USER STORY 17: Provider profile editing - all fields present (photo, name, email, city, service area, description, languages multi-select, specializations, bank details). Profile completion % updates
USER STORY 18: Compliance pages render - /privacy, /terms, /support, /contact, /delete-account, /permissions all accessible
USER STORY 19: Delete account flow - deletion request submission works when authenticated
Backend API: All 30 endpoints tested - 100% pass rate
Frontend: All buttons clickable, navigation working, mobile-first responsive design verified
Design: Deep medical blue (#1E40AF) color scheme, gradient backgrounds, healthcare aesthetic confirmed
Mock OTP: 123456 correctly displayed in API response and shown on screen
Admin password: resqly-admin-2026 works correctly
